title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Big Mom, Brook, Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom Pirates as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: whole cake chateau

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Sure, why not?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're serious?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah~! I'm dead serious!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: S'long as it's within reason, I'm a woman who's more than willing to listen to what others got to say!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll let your current comrades, the straw hat crew, leave this island alive! Every last one of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You have Momma's word!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you've finally decided to settle down and get married without Putin' up a fuss, and won't try to run away from here,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I got no problem closing my eyes to a few things here and there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A new report is a powerful source of

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't thank you enough! ...I promise, I'll make pudding the happiest girl alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Haaah Ahaha! Ooh~!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you've really fallen for my daughter, haven't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's wonderful to hear!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But let me just be crystal clear about one thing... what those damn straw hats did to me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Under normal circumstances, I'd make 'em pay dearly, under- stand?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: destroying the seducing woods... taking down one of my sweet commanders... and moreover....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On top of all that, having the nerve to eat my candy on fish- man island! Saying they picked a fight with me would be an understatement!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But as things stand now, your and pudding's marriage is my top priority! If all proceeds according to plan,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: by this time tomorrow... I will acquire Germa's military might, and eat...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Deeeeelicous wedding cake together with everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So long as you don't try any funny business, everything will fall into place perfectly, Sanji :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Inside Whole Cake Chateau: The Room of Offerings

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: In all the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those unbreakable obelisk texts which haven't crumbled even over the course of hundreds of years...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The DoneGlyphs! It is said that approximately thirty of them exist in all-bon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But only nine hold the crucial information we need!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before long, we will be led to the final island, rafflel,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And there, those stones will impart unto us the truth of this world-soir!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ryan! I beg of you, Lord smoothie! You mustn't do this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sawards anyone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I humbly ask for your mercy, Lord smoothie!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, in order to go to Rafiel, the final island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those red stones... the "road Doneglyphs" are absolutely needed!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Rio PoneGlyphs

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Lord smoothie!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: including the stone that jinbe brought to us the other day,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I brought ya a pre- sent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I picked it up along the way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I helped too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Lord Smoo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thie... (1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Our big mom pirate crew now owns...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Two PoneGlyphs, and one road poneglyph!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For a total of three stones, Vous plait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AaaAA Aahhh Hhh..)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I under- stand that they're very important, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom pirates three sweet commanders (minister of juice)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still don't see why we had to increase our security detail like this, Tamago...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At any rate, I'm free until the tea party begins, so I do not mind accompanying you for security duty...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 14th daughter of the Charlotte Family CHARLOTTE SMOOTHIE Bounty: $32,000g@gmail.com

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I am in your debt, Renaissance.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 53 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
